Fields.Name: Attack ID
Fields.Description: Set the attack parameters that are applied when this bullet impacts a victim.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Projectile
Fields.Description: SFX ID before acceleration. If the SFX ID after acceleration is -1, this SFX will continue to fly even after acceleration.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Impact
Fields.Description: Impact SFX ID. -1 means it does not occur.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Repel
Fields.Description: SFX ID when repelling projectile. -1 means it does not occur.

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: Time for projectile to exist in flight (-1 is infinite). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Attenuation Range
Fields.Description: If the bullet flight distance exceeds this value, the attenuation set by other parameters will be applied.

Fields.Name: Shoot Interval
Fields.Description: The interval at which the projectile is emitted. Applied when generated via the TAE Bullet Behavior event. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Gravity: In Range
Fields.Description: Gravity applied downward within range. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Gravity: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Gravity applied downward outside of range. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Homing Stop Range
Fields.Description: The distance at which the bullet homing will stop being applied.

Fields.Name: Initial Velocity
Fields.Description: Initial speed of projectile.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: In Range
Fields.Description: Acceleration whilst projectile is within distance threshold. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Acceleration whilst projectile is beyond the distance threshold. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Maximum Velocity
Fields.Description: The maximum speed of the bullet. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Minimum Velocity
Fields.Description: The minimum speed of the bullet. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Acceleration Start Delay
Fields.Description: The delay before the projectile will start accelerating. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Homing Start Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which projectile homing will start to be applied.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Initial
Fields.Description: The initial radius of the hitbox.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum radius of the hitbox, the duration for the hitbox to change from initial to max radius is determined by spreadTime. (If -1, radius is same as initial hitbox radius).

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Spread Time
Fields.Description: The amount of time  takes for hitbox radius to grow from initial value to max value. If 0, only the initial radius is used. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Expansion Delay
Fields.Description: The duration from the projectile landing to the start of hit radius expansion (if 0, it expands immediately).

Fields.Name: Homing Correction Offset
Fields.Description: If set to 0, the projectile will track with perfect accuracy. Otherwise, the target location is offset by this amount in the direction to victim is moving.

Fields.Name: Damage Application Interval
Fields.Description: The interval at which damage can be applied by this bullet to a victim. 0 means it will only ever apply once.

Fields.Name: External Force Modifier
Fields.Description: The external force modifier to apply to the projectile in the direction of shooting (Y-axis is removed) based on map factor.

Fields.Name: Shooter SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The SpEffect applied to owner of bullet upon being emitted.

Fields.Name: Funnel Think ID
Fields.Description: The think parameters used by the funnel to search for the target (e.g. soulmass).

Fields.Name: Hit Bullet ID
Fields.Description: The bullet to generate when the projectile expires, or conditionally according to some launchConditionType values.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 0
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 1
Fields.Description: SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 2
Fields.Description: SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 3
Fields.Description: SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 4
Fields.Description: SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Number of Shots
Fields.Description: The number of projectiles produced per emitter interval.

Fields.Name: Homing Strength
Fields.Description: The amount of tracking correction made each second, affecting the speed the projectile faces the victim. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Firing Angle
Fields.Description: Specify the horizontal angle at which the projectile should be fired, offset from the emitter origin. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Firing Angle Interval
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the horizontal angle interval at which to fire (Y-axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Vertical Firing Angle Interval
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the vertical angle interval at which to fire (X-axis). Positive angle upwards, negative angle downwards. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Physical
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Physical damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Magic
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Magic damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Fire
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Fire damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Lightning
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Lightning damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Stamina
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Stamina damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Knockback
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, knockback falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Vertical Firing Angle
Fields.Description: Specify the vertical angle of the projectile that should be fired. Positive values angle upwards, negative values angle downwards. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Maximum Tracking Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum angle the bullet's initial direction can change to face towards player locked-on target or AI focused enemy. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Penetrate Map
Fields.Description: If ON, allows a projectile to pierce through enemies and objects. Also potentially allows hitting the same enemy multiple times using dmgHitRecordLifetime. See isPenetrateMap to ignore map.

Fields.Name: Previous Movement Direction Addition %
Fields.Description: The ratio to add the previous movement direction to the current direction when the sliding projectile hits the wall.

Fields.Name: Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Attack attribute to use when applying attack against the victim.

Fields.Name: Special Attribute
Fields.Description: Special attributes to use when applying attack against the victim.

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation Type
Fields.Description: Specify the particles and sounds to apply for the attack against the victim.

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation: Material
Fields.Description: Specify the particles and sounds to apply for the attack against the victim.

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation: Size
Fields.Description: Specify the size of the particles to apply for the attack against the victim.

Fields.Name: Launch Condition Type
Fields.Description: Conditions required for HitBulletID to generate upon impact or expiration.

Fields.Name: Follow Type
Fields.Description: Affects projectile position and behavior.

Fields.Name: Emitter Position Type
Fields.Description: Where projectile appears when created.

Fields.Name: Persistent Hit Particles
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile SFX will remain stuck in the victim it it collides.

Fields.Name: Allow Continuous Hit
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile will hit continously upon impact.

Fields.Name: Penetrate Map
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile will pass through collision and map pieces.

Fields.Name: Hit Both Teams
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile will collide with both victim and owner team types.

Fields.Name: Use Shared Hit List
Fields.Description: If ON, multiple projectile from the same emitter that collide with a victim will count as one projectile in terms of updating the damage interval.

Fields.Name: Use Multiple Dummy Polygons for Emit
Fields.Description: If ON, multiple dummy polygons with shared ID can be used for emitting the projectile.

Fields.Name: Deflection Type
Fields.Description: The deflection type for this projectile against other projectiles.

Fields.Name: Is Physical Projectile (for Deflection)
Fields.Description: If ON, this projectile can be deflected by projectiles with attachEffectType set to 1.

Fields.Name: Block Hit Particle Emit on Water Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, do not emit the hit particle if the projectile hits the water surface

Fields.Name: Penetrate Water Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile will pass through water collision.

Fields.Name: Is Magical Projectile (for Deflection)
Fields.Description: If ON, this projectile can be deflected by projectiles with attachEffectType set to 3.
